spec: Vault task 0041 (S, unblocked; Now items above it are queued/awaiting-user: 0027 awaits sign-off, 0034/0038 skills are watch-tier, 0036 depends on 0034's unlanded layout). Follow vault-loop SKILL.md conventions. Steps: (1) FIRST edit /root/claude-brain/tasks/0041-persist-frozen-run-config-with-hash.md frontmatter to `status: in-progress` (this edit must appear in your reported changes). (2) In /root/noema-evolve read noema/config.py (NoemaConfig, its from_yaml and __post_init__) and noema/controller.py (NoemaController.__init__, run, save_checkpoint/load_checkpoint). (3) Add a serializer on NoemaConfig (e.g. to_dict + a module-level dump using yaml.safe_dump(sort_keys=True) — pyyaml already ships with openevolve; do NOT add any dependency) that emits the fully-resolved config including CLI-derived values and nested dataclasses. (4) In NoemaController.__init__, write it once to <output_dir>/config.yaml, guarded: if the file already exists (checkpoint resume), do NOT overwrite. Log its sha256 (hashlib) at write time. (5) Tests in tests/test_noema_controller.py, matching its existing unittest style: test_run_dir_contains_frozen_config (after constructing/running a stubbed controller, <output_dir>/config.yaml exists and round-trips), test_paired_arm_configs_differ_only_in_coordination_module (serialize two configs identical except coordination.module='null' vs 'pes'; diff of the two texts contains only lines mentioning module), test_resume_does_not_clobber_config (pre-existing config.yaml content unchanged after second controller init). (6) Run `python3 -m unittest discover tests`; paste the literal output tail into the task's Output/notes section plus a one-paragraph record of decisions. (7) `git add -A` in the worktree so every new/modified file's CONTENT appears in the diff — prior verifications FAILED because new files were left untracked and unverifiable. Never: touch noema/coordination/base.py, noema/budget/, any run/output/checkpoints dir, or any existing test's assertions; no new dependency; keep total changed lines under 200 (if the resolved config's nested openevolve dataclasses make this impossible, stop and record that in Output/notes instead of getting clever). Do NOT move the task to done/ or edit INDEX.md — the host loop does that.
done_when: cd into the worktree and `python3 -m unittest discover tests` exits 0, and the same tail is pasted in the task file's Output/notes

git diff (staged included) shows a config.yaml write guarded against overwrite in noema/controller.py __init__ path and a serializer in noema/config.py, with full contents of every new file (nothing left untracked)
grep -n 'test_paired_arm_configs_differ_only_in_coordination_module\|test_run_dir_contains_frozen_config\|test_resume_does_not_clobber_config' tests/test_noema_controller.py finds all three tests
git diff --stat shows no changes under noema/coordination/base.py, noema/budget/, or any *output*/checkpoints dir, and total changed lines <= 200
/root/claude-brain/tasks/0041-persist-frozen-run-config-with-hash.md frontmatter reads `status: in-progress` and Output/notes is filled per vault-loop SKILL.md
